fields.Name: Wild Apricot
fields.Description: Wild Apricot (part of Personify/Momentive Software) is an AMS for small-to-mid-size associations. This integration syncs contacts, membership levels, events, registrations, invoices, payments, donations, and audit log items via the v2.3 Admin REST API ...

fields.Name: Contacts
fields.Description: Contacts — members, prospects, and staff. The primary people object. Supports rich custom fields via a nested FieldValues[] array keyed by SystemCode. Incremental sync uses ProfileLastUpdated with the $filter display-name syntax.

fields.Name: FirstName
fields.Description: Shortcut to the FirstName system field.

fields.Name: LastName
fields.Description: Shortcut to the LastName system field.

fields.Name: Email
fields.Description: Primary contact email — de-facto natural key.

fields.Name: MembershipEnabled
fields.Description: Whether the contact currently has an active membership.

fields.Name: Status
fields.Description: Current membership status. Only present for members.

fields.Name: ProfileLastUpdated
fields.Description: Watermark field used by server-side incremental sync. Referenced in $filter as 'Profile last updated'.

fields.Name: FieldValues
fields.Description: Nested array of custom-field values keyed by SystemCode. Each entry is { FieldName, SystemCode, Value } with Value typed per the ContactField definition.

fields.Name: ContactFields
fields.Description: Definitions of contact fields including custom fields. Drives runtime custom-field discovery.

fields.Name: SystemCode
fields.Description: Stable SystemCode used in FieldValues entries on Contacts.

fields.Name: FieldName
fields.Description: Human-readable field name as shown to admins.

fields.Name: FieldType
fields.Description: Data type — String, Text, Number, Choice, MultipleChoice, Boolean, Date, DateTime, Email, Phone, Picture, Document, etc.

fields.Name: MemberOnly
fields.Description: Whether this field is visible only to members.

fields.Name: IsSystem
fields.Description: True for built-in Wild Apricot fields; false for admin-defined custom fields.

fields.Name: MembershipLevels
fields.Description: Membership tiers — individual and bundle — with fees, renewal settings, and eligibility.

fields.Name: MembershipFee
fields.Description: Price of being a member at this level.

fields.Name: PublicCanApply
fields.Description: Whether non-members can self-apply for this level.

fields.Name: BundleMembersLimit
fields.Description: Maximum bundle members. Empty for individuals.

fields.Name: MemberGroups
fields.Description: Ad-hoc member groups that admins create for email targeting and privileges.

fields.Name: ContactsCount
fields.Description: Count of members currently in the group.

fields.Name: ContactIds
fields.Description: Array of contact IDs belonging to the group.

fields.Name: Events
fields.Description: Event catalog — meetings, conferences, webinars — with scheduling, location, and registration settings.

fields.Name: EventRegistrations
fields.Description: Links a Contact to an Event with a RegistrationType. Supports check-in, memo, and field values.

fields.Name: IsCheckedIn
fields.Description: Check-in flag for events that track attendance.

fields.Name: RegistrationDate
fields.Description: When the registration was created (account local time).

fields.Name: ShowToPublic
fields.Description: Whether this registration is visible on public event pages.

fields.Name: EventRegistrationTypes
fields.Description: Registration type definitions per event — pricing, availability windows, and membership-level eligibility.

fields.Name: IsEnabled
fields.Description: Whether this type is available for selection.

fields.Name: BasePrice
fields.Description: Price registrant pays for this registration type.

fields.Name: MaximumRegistrantsCount
fields.Description: Maximum registrants for this registration type.

fields.Name: IsWaitlistEnabled
fields.Description: Whether registrants should be waitlisted when capacity is reached.

fields.Name: Invoices
fields.Description: Invoices including member dues, events, store purchases, and donations. Supports full CRUD.

fields.Name: IsPaid
fields.Description: Whether the invoice is fully paid.

fields.Name: PaidAmount
fields.Description: Sum already paid for this invoice.

fields.Name: OrderType
fields.Description: Originating order type (dues, event, donation, store, etc.).

fields.Name: VoidedDate
fields.Description: When the invoice was voided. Empty if not voided.

fields.Name: Payments
fields.Description: Payments linking contacts and tenders to invoices.

fields.Name: Refunds
fields.Description: Refund records with tender reference and settled amounts.

fields.Name: SettledValue
fields.Description: Previously settled amount before this refund.

fields.Name: Donations
fields.Description: Donation transactions with donor, amount, fund, and comment fields.

fields.Name: Tenders
fields.Description: Payment methods (cash, check, credit card, etc.). Supports full CRUD.

fields.Name: IsCustom
fields.Description: Whether this tender was created by the account admin.

fields.Name: Bundles
fields.Description: Membership bundles grouping multiple sub-members under a primary administrator.

fields.Name: SpacesLeft
fields.Description: Remaining capacity if the bundle size is limited.

fields.Name: SentEmails
fields.Description: Outgoing email history with delivery, open, click, and failure metrics.

fields.Name: InProgress
fields.Description: Whether the send is still in progress.

fields.Name: EmailDrafts
fields.Description: Draft emails including scheduled-send metadata. Deletable via API.

fields.Name: EventId
fields.Description: Associated event if the draft targets an event.

fields.Name: IsScheduled
fields.Description: Whether the draft is scheduled to send.

fields.Name: ScheduledDate
fields.Description: When the draft is scheduled to send.

fields.Name: LastChangedDate
fields.Description: When the draft was last modified.

fields.Name: AuditLogItems
fields.Description: Tenant-wide audit log capturing admin and member actions, errors, and info events.

fields.Name: DocumentAction
fields.Description: Action performed on the related document type.

fields.Name: SavedSearches
fields.Description: Saved contact searches with pre-computed contact ID lists.

fields.Name: StoreProducts
fields.Description: Storefront product catalog with pricing, stock, options and variants.

fields.Name: outOfStock
fields.Description: Whether the product is currently out of stock.
